steps.title: with 4x6 insert for [2ml Eppendorf snapcap tubes](https://online-shop
steps.instruction: with 4x6 insert for [2ml Eppendorf snapcap tubes](https://online-shop.eppendorf.us/US-en/Laboratory-Consumables-44512/Tubes-44515/Eppendorf-Safe-Lock-Tubes-PF-8863.html) or equivalent. * [Opentrons 10ul and 200ul filter tipracks](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips) * [Opentrons GEN1 P10 and P300 single-channel electronic pipettes](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes/products/single-channel-electronic-pipette) --- 4x6 tuberack with 2ml Eppendorf snapcap tube (slot 2) * tube A

steps.title: water 4x6 aluminum block insert with...
steps.instruction: water 4x6 aluminum block insert with 2ml Eppendorf snapcap tube (on temperature module, slot 4): * tube A

steps.title: Input the sample volume `
steps.instruction: Input the sample volume `.csv` file formatted as specified above, the volume of water for pooling (in uL), and the respective mount sides for your P10 and p300 single-channel pipettes.

steps.title: Upload your protocol into the OT App
steps.instruction: Upload your protocol into the OT App.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
